title: sorbus cretica f. orbiculata
intro: Sorbus cretica f. orbiculata is a variety of the Cretan whitebeam plant, a type of deciduous shrub or small tree that belongs to the Rosaceae family, native to the mountainous regions of the Mediterranean. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and astringent properties. The health benefits of Sorbus cretica f. orbiculata include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and soothe digestive problems. Herbal preparations of the plant are often made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
